record.field: Hai ${ctx.get('notification_to_user').name} Document ${object.name} dari ${object.user_id.name} butuh approval anda sebagai Approver ${object.get_internal_url() | safe}
originator = record.user_id or user data.update( url=record.get_internal_url(), source_number=record.name, source_document=record.get_internal_description(), source_originator_name=originator.name, )
